methods.String getMethod(): Returns the HTTP method this request uses, such as GET, PUT, POST, or other.
methods.ProtocolVersion getProtocolVersion(): Gets the protocol version of the request.
methods.RequestLine getRequestLine(): Gets the request line of the HTTP request.
methods.void releaseConnection(): A convenience method to simplify migration from HttpClient 3.1 API.
methods.void setProtocolVersion(ProtocolVersion: Sets the protocol version of the request.
methods.String toString(): Returns a string representation of the request.
